scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check
scripts.test:loader:e2e: pnpm test:loader:e2e:prepare && pnpm test:loader:e2e:webpack && pnpm test:loader:e2e:rspack
scripts.test:loader:e2e:rspack: pnpm --dir test/bundlers/rspack exec rspack build --config rspack.config.mjs && pnpm --dir test/bundlers/rspack exec vitest --config vitest.config.ts run
scripts.test:loader:e2e:webpack: pnpm --dir test/bundlers/webpack exec webpack --config webpack.config.mjs && pnpm --dir test/bundlers/webpack exec vitest --config vitest.config.ts run
